summary: Code review verified two-step reset confirmation flow in settings.tsx. No PIN input required - only double confirmation. All 7 requirements verified via static code analysis.

success_rate.backend: N/A - React Native app, no backend APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: React Native/Expo mobile app. No web frontend for Playwright. Testing via static code analysis and TypeScript compilation.

no_pin_input_in_reset_flow.description: Reset modal (lines 1148-1232) contains NO PIN input fields or PIN verification calls

step1_button.code: resetStep === 1 ? 'Yes, Reset Everything' : 'Delete All Data Now'

confirmResetAllData.action: Executes full data reset and redirects to welcome
